playlists.descriptionBs: Uvod u arapsko pismo, osnove vokabulara i gramatike. 110 lekcija pokrivaju Knjigu 1 i Knjigu 1b.
playlists.descriptionEn: Introduction to Arabic script, basic vocabulary and grammar. 110 lessons covering Book 1 and Book 1b.

playlists.descriptionBs: Napredna gramatika, glagolski oblici i prošireni vokabular. 65 lekcija.
playlists.descriptionEn: Advanced grammar, verb forms and expanded vocabulary. 65 lessons.

playlists.descriptionBs: Složeni tekstovi, stilistika i visoki arapski. 63 lekcije.
playlists.descriptionEn: Complex texts, stylistics and elevated Arabic. 63 lessons.
